top3.sql:
WITH lap_position_changes AS (
    SELECT
        lp1.race_id,
        lp1.driver_id,
        lp1.lap AS current_lap,
        lp2.lap AS previous_lap,
        lp1.position AS current_position,
        lp2.position AS previous_position,
        lp1.lap_type,
        CASE
            WHEN lp1.lap_type = 'pit_stop_exit' THEN 'Pit Stop Exit'
            WHEN lp1.lap_type = 'pit_stop_entry' THEN 'Pit Stop Entry'
            WHEN lp1.lap_type = 'retirement' THEN 'Retirement'
            WHEN lp1.lap_t...
